info.title: IntraVox API
info.description: IntraVox is a modern intranet page builder for Nextcloud. This API provides endpoints for managing pages, media, navigation, comments, reactions, the Photo Story widget (galleries with EXIF, maps and lightbox) and the File Story widget (document libraries with MetaVox-aware filtering and federated-share awareness).

tags.name: Public Share
tags.description: Anonymous access to shared content via Nextcloud share links. No authentication required — access is controlled by the share token. Password-protected shares require session-based authentication via the /s/{token}/authenticate endpoint.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Page template management - create pages from templates, save custom templates, and manage template library

get.description: Returns a list of all pages the current user has access to

post.description: Creates a new page with the given data

get.description: Returns the hierarchical page tree structure
Returns a single page by its unique ID

delete.description: Deletes a page and all its children

get.description: Returns the breadcrumb path for a page
Returns version history for a page

post.description: Restores a page to a previous version
Uploads a media file to a page

get.description: Returns a list of media files for a page
Returns a media file
Search pages by title and content
Returns news items for the News widget with optional filtering

parameters.name: sourcePath
parameters.description: Source folder path (relative to language folder)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return

get.description: Returns the navigation structure
Returns the footer configuration
Returns comments for a page

post.description: Creates a new comment on a page

get.description: Check if MetaVox app is installed and enabled
Returns a list of all available page templates including built-in and custom templates

post.description: Saves an existing page as a reusable template. Copies the page structure and media to the templates folder.

get.description: Returns the full template data including layout and widgets

delete.description: Deletes a custom template. Built-in templates cannot be deleted.

post.description: Creates a new page based on an existing template. Clones the template's layout, widgets, and media files.

400.description: Invalid template ID or missing parameters

get.description: Returns the current user's permissions

get.summary: Get a page via share token
get.description: Returns a page's content for anonymous access via a Nextcloud share link. The page must be within the share's scope. Password-protected shares require a valid session (see /s/{token}/authenticate).

parameters.name: uniqueId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the page to retrieve

200.description: Page data including content, breadcrumb, and metadata

403.description: Page is outside the share scope

404.description: Share token invalid or page not found

get.description: Returns the navigation menu filtered to the share's scope. Only items within the shared folder are included.

200.description: Navigation data filtered by share scope

get.summary: Get page tree for a share
get.description: Returns the page tree structure filtered to the share's scope.

200.description: Page tree filtered by share scope

get.summary: Get news items for a share
get.description: Returns news items from pages within the share scope. Supports filtering by source page and sorting.

parameters.name: sourcePageId
parameters.description: Filter news to a specific source page

200.description: List of news items within share scope

get.summary: Get page media via share token
get.description: Returns a media file (image, video, etc.) attached to a page within the share scope.

404.description: Share token invalid or media not found

get.summary: Get shared resource media via share token
get.description: Returns a media file from the shared resources library (_resources folder).

404.description: Share token invalid or resource not found

get.summary: Get shared resource media from subfolder via share token
get.description: Returns a media file from a subfolder within the shared resources library.

404.description: Share token invalid or resource not found

get.summary: Get share info for a page
get.description: Returns information about whether and how a page is shared via Nextcloud share links. Includes scope, password status, and public URL.
Returns an RSS 2.0 feed of IntraVox pages accessible to the token owner. Supports conditional requests via ETag and If-Modified-Since headers.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: ETag from a previous response for conditional request

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: Last-Modified value from a previous response

404.description: Invalid token or feed not found

get.description: Serves media files (images) referenced in feed items, authenticated by the feed token.

404.description: Invalid token or media not found

get.description: Returns the user's feed token information including the feed URL, configuration, and last accessed timestamp.

post.description: Creates a new feed token (or replaces the existing one). The old feed URL stops working immediately.

403.description: Link sharing is disabled by the administrator

delete.description: Deletes the user's feed token. The feed URL becomes invalid immediately.

put.description: Updates feed scope and item limit without changing the token.

get.description: Returns all calendars available to the current user (personal + shared)
Returns events from one or more calendars within a time range. Recurring events are expanded into individual occurrences. Private/confidential events are filtered out.

parameters.name: rangeStart
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to now

parameters.name: rangeEnd
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days from now

get.summary: Get calendar events via public share
get.description: Returns calendar events using the share owner's context. Requires a valid share token.

get.summary: List photos in a folder (paged, mode-aware)
get.description: Returns a paged list of photo rows enriched with NC core metadata + MetaVox metadata. Supports timeline/grid/highlights/on-this-day modes, MetaVox filters and cross-folder mode (empty folder + ≥1 filter).

200.description: Paged photo list with capabilities + map settings

400.description: Invalid mode / filter payload too large

404.description: Folder not found for this user

get.summary: GPS-cluster the photos in a folder (capped at 5000)
Server-side capabilities for the Photo Story widget

200.description: MetaVox availability + map settings + (admin) global toggles

get.summary: MetaVox field discovery for filter-builder / sort / group-by

200.description: List of MetaVox field definitions (name, label, type)

get.summary: Detailed EXIF for a single photo (used by the lightbox info-pane)

404.description: File not found or no EXIF data

get.summary: Range-aware video streaming endpoint for the lightbox
List documents in a folder (paged, mode-aware)
get.description: Mirrors the Photo Story photos endpoint but constrained to document mimetypes. Supports timeline/list/tiles/grouped modes and federated-share-aware MetaVox handling.

400.description: Invalid mode / filter payload too large / folder required

404.description: Folder not found for this user

get.summary: Server-side capabilities for the File Story widget (incl. federated-share detection)

schema.description: When provided, response includes sourceIsFederated + sourceFederatedInfo

get.summary: MetaVox field discovery for File Story filter-builder / sort / group-by

Widget.description: A widget on an IntraVox page. The set of properties that are honored by the server-side sanitizer depends on `type` — see `WidgetConfig` for the widget-specific schemas.

type.description: Widget type — must be one of the values accepted by PageService::ALLOWED_WIDGET_TYPES. Unknown types are dropped on save.

column.description: Column position within the row (1-based, clamped to row width).

content.description: Body — used by text/heading widgets only.

backgroundColor.description: Whitelisted CSS variable or 'transparent' — links / news / people / calendar / feed.

title.description: Widget header — news / video / people / calendar / feed.

limit.description: Max items to render — news / people / calendar / feed / photo-story / file-story.

sortBy.description: Sort field — news / people / photo-story / file-story.

filterOperator.description: MetaVox filter join logic — news / people.

sourcePageId.description: Page UUID — news source via PageTreeSelect.

WidgetConfig.description: Nested config used by widgets with rich configuration surfaces. Currently photo-story and file-story.

mode.description: Layout mode. photo-story: timeline/highlights/grid/on-this-day. file-story: timeline/tiles/list/grouped.

sortBy.description: mtime / name / size / any MetaVox field name.

allMetaVoxFolders.description: photo-story cross-folder mode (legacy flag, synced with empty folderPath).

groupBy.description: file-story group-by field (category / MetaVox field name).

publishedOnField.description: MetaVox field name for publish date

depublishedOnField.description: MetaVox field name for expiration date

widgetTypes.description: List of widget types used in template

pageId.description: Unique ID of page to save as template
